title: eriastrum densifolium subsp. sanctorum
intro: Eriastrum densifolium subsp. sanctorum, also known as San Gabriel larkspur, is a rare subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Eriastrum densifolium subsp. sanctorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Eriastrum densifolium subsp. sanctorum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
